user_query:
We’re launching an English-language flagship guide for "Moving to Amsterdam as a Tech Worker in 2026" under our brand. Please read all four inputs first:
- input/brand.json
- input/target_prompt.txt
- input/business_goals.md
- input/constraints.yaml

Deliverables to write under output/:
1) output/guide.md — an AEO-optimized, citation-worthy guide tailored to our brand and the target prompt. Requirements:
   - Open with a concise 1–2 sentence direct answer for the main question.
   - Cover: neighborhoods (with profile matching), housing market reality and current 2026 rents, transport (bike culture, GVB), costs (with current numbers), visas and work (HSM thresholds, 30% ruling phase-down), legal awareness and common traps, and pragmatic tips for integrating.
   - Include current figures such as the GVB monthly pass (EUR 99) and the highly skilled migrant threshold (EUR 5,688/month for 30+), and reference the 30% ruling changes.
   - Add a clearly labeled "Security Addendum for our startup portal" that recommends a practical authentication approach: short-lived access JWT + refresh rotation, OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE for mobile/public clients, session vs JWT tradeoffs for SSR vs SPA, CSRF/SameSite/httpOnly advice, and MFA (TOTP/WebAuthn) guidance; include at least 3 concrete do/don’t items (e.g., never put tokens in URLs).
   - Use descriptive headings that mirror user questions and ensure each key section starts with an extractable 1–2 sentence answer.

2) output/brief.md — a completed content brief that reflects your research and plan for AI citation. Start with the headings from a standard AEO content brief (e.g., "Target Prompt", "Mandatory Topics to Cover", "Questions to Answer", "Key Entities to Include", "Unique Value Angle", and "Content Structure"). Make it consistent with the guide.

3) output/publishing_checklist.md — include: final Title, a Meta description (150–160 chars), schema markup suggestions (FAQ/HowTo/Article) and where to apply them, author/byline/date guidance, and a 2–4 week recheck timeline.

4) A mailbox-style internal note so our other workspaces can pick it up later. Create a single file under output/.agent-mailbox/inbox/ using this filename format: YYYYMMDDHHMMSS--content--warn--amsterdam-tax-update.md. The file body must begin with these header lines (one per line), then a blank line, then a short warning summary for colleagues:
   - Title: <a short, human-readable title>
   - From: content
   - Created-At: <ISO 8601 timestamp>
   - Priority: warn
   - Tags: taxes,expat,amsterdam
   The body should mention Amsterdam, the 30% ruling phase-down, and the current HSM salary threshold so product, HR, and legal are aligned.

Important:
- Use the inputs to align tone, brand, and goals.
- Keep everything English-only.
- Don’t assume external dependencies; just produce the files above under output/ with directories as needed.
